}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$0b,$0b,$0b,$0b,$0b,$05,$05,{

Sprites34_StreetFighter_15 byte {
}$05,$0a,$0a,$01,$01,$05,$01,$0e,$05,$05,$0d,$0d,$01,$01,$00,$00,{

'Sprites34_StreetFighter Colors
Sprites34_StreetFighterColors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x0
}%11111111_00000101_00000101_00000101,{   'index=0x1
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x2
}%11111111_01001010_01001010_01001010,{   'index=0x3
}%11111111_11111111_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x4
}%11111111_11111110_11000111_10100000,{   'index=0x5
}%11111111_11110011_11110011_11110011,{   'index=0x6
}%11111111_11111111_11111111_11111111,{   'index=0x7
}%11111111_00001010_00011011_00011001,{   'index=0x8
}%11111111_11111000_11111000_11111000,{   'index=0x9
}%11111111_11111010_11111010_11111010,{   'index=0xa
}%11111111_11101110_11010010_00100001,{   'index=0xb
}%11111111_11101110_10110111_10001111,{   'index=0xc
}%11111111_11110101_01011010_00011001,{   'index=0xd
}%11111111_11111010_00100000_00110000   'index=0xe
